question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the chapters of the thesis. Instead, it provides a project timeline/development plan with deadlines. A thesis introduction should outline the structural components (e.g., Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, etc.).

question: Description
feedback: The text does not describe the content of any thesis sections. It only lists tasks and their respective deadlines. There is no explanation of what will be covered within the research itself.

question: Structure
feedback: The text describes the workflow/process of the student rather than the structure of the final thesis document. A reader cannot understand the organization of the thesis paper from this schedule.
